name: Anil H. Gore
title: Associate Professor (Analytical Chemistry)
bio: Dr. Anil H. Gore is an Associate Professor of Analytical Chemistry at Tarsadia Institute of Chemical Science, UKA Tarsadia University, Surat, Gujarat, India. His research focuses on micro/nanoplastics analysis, sustainable nanotechnology, carbonaceous nanomaterials, and environmental remediation. He has 70+ publications, 4 patents, h-index 28, and 2660+ citations.

name: Pooja V. Deore
title: PhD Scholar (Awarded Dec 2024)
bio: Miss Pooja V. Deore completed her PhD under Dr. Gore's supervision on 'Designing of Hybrid Hydrogel for Removal of Emerging Contaminants.' Her research focuses on hydrogel-based environmental remediation and wastewater treatment.

name: Pinal S. Bhavsar
title: PhD Scholar (Thesis Submitted)
bio: Miss Pinal S. Bhavsar is a PhD student under Dr. Gore's supervision, working on 'Extraction and Analysis of Microplastics from Various Samples.' Her work addresses the critical challenge of microplastic contamination in food and environmental matrices.

name: Suraj Yadav
title: PhD Scholar (Working)
bio: Mr. Suraj Yadav is a PhD student under Dr. Gore's supervision working on 'Advanced Approaches for Sustainable Remediation of Emerging Environmental Pollutants in Water.'

name: Anant D. Yadav
title: PhD Scholar (Working)
bio: Mr. Anant D. Yadav is a PhD student under Dr. Gore's supervision working on 'Analysis of Nitrosamine Impurities in Pharmaceuticals by GC/LC-MS-MS Techniques.'

name: Aniket H. Sawat
title: PhD Scholar (Working)
bio: Mr. Aniket H. Sawat is a PhD student under Dr. Gore's supervision working on 'Development of Sustainable Technology for Microplastic/Nanoplastic Remediation from Wastewater.'

name: Bhavesh Der
title: PhD Scholar (Working)
bio: Mr. Bhavesh Der is a PhD student under Dr. Gore's supervision working on 'Ecofriendly Electrode Material for Lithium/Sodium Ion Batteries.'

name: Govind B. Kolekar
title: Professor (Physical Chemistry), Shivaji University, Kolhapur
bio: Prof. Govind B. Kolekar is a Professor of Physical Chemistry at Shivaji University, Kolhapur. He was Dr. Gore's PhD advisor and a long-term collaborator in fluorescence spectroscopy and nanomaterial-based sensors.

name: Prashant V. Anbhule
title: Professor (Organic Chemistry), Shivaji University, Kolhapur
bio: Prof. Prashant V. Anbhule is a Professor of Organic Chemistry at Shivaji University, Kolhapur. He collaborates with Dr. Gore on functional nanomaterials and chemosensors.

name: Daewon Sohn
title: Professor, Korea University, Seoul, South Korea
bio: Prof. Daewon Sohn from Korea University collaborates with Dr. Gore on advanced materials, hydrogel systems, and energy applications.

name: Yasuhito Shimada
title: Professor, Mie University, Japan
bio: Prof. Yasuhito Shimada from Mie University collaborates with Dr. Gore on microplastics analysis and environmental toxicology.

name: Chandrashekhar S. Patil
title: Researcher
bio: Dr. Chandrashekhar S. Patil collaborates with Dr. Gore on waste biomass valorization, activated carbon, and sustainable wastewater treatment.

name: Omkar S. Nille
title: Researcher
bio: Dr. Omkar S. Nille collaborates with Dr. Gore on carbonaceous nanomaterials, eco-hydrogels, and tea waste valorization.
